qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Command injection via AMP command execution with insufficient input validation
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Root cause is command injection through secure_popen() in glances/amps/default/__init__.py and glances/secure.py. The advisory describes unauthenticated config secret exposure via /api/4/config endpoint and as_dict() in glances/config.py:280-287. Different vulnerable code, different root cause, different impact.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Command injection via backtick execution in configuration file parser
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Root cause is backtick command execution in config.get_value() at glances/config.py:332-336 via system_exec(). The advisory describes as_dict() returning all config values without filtering at glances/config.py:280-287 via an unauthenticated REST API endpoint. Different function, different lines, different root cause (command execution vs information disclosure), different impact.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Arbitrary code execution via unsafe pickle deserialization in version cache
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Root cause is unsafe pickle.load() in glances/outdated.py:120-121. The advisory describes unauthenticated config secret exposure via /api/4/config endpoint. Completely different component, different root cause, different vulnerability class.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerability. The advisory (GHSA-gh4x-f7cq-wwx6) describes unauthenticated exposure of configuration secrets via the /api/4/config REST API endpoint in glances_restful_api.py:1154-1167, where config.as_dict() returns all config values including passwords and tokens without filtering. None of the three qualifying findings target this specific root cause. amp-command-injection targets secure_popen() in AMP execution; command-injection-config-backticks targets backtick command execution in config.get_value() at a different location in config.py; pickle-deserialization-rce targets pickle.load() in the outdated module.
evidence: Advisory root cause: _api_config() in glances/outputs/glances_restful_api.py:1154-1167 calls self.config.as_dict() returning all config including secrets
Advisory root cause: as_dict() in glances/config.py:280-287 iterates all sections/options without filtering
Advisory root cause: When self.args.password is not set, no authentication is required (glances_restful_api.py:472-475)
amp-command-injection targets glances/secure.py and glances/amps/default/__init__.py - different code
command-injection-config-backticks targets config.get_value() at config.py:332-336 - different function and lines
pickle-deserialization-rce targets glances/outdated.py:120-121 - different module entirely
